project_type: TypeScript monorepo with Fastify 5 backends and Next.js 15 frontends
build_system: pnpm 10 + Turborepo 2. Turbo tasks: build (tsc/next build), typecheck (tsc --noEmit), test (vitest run), lint (eslint). Build depends on ^build.
test_framework: vitest 2 with @vitest/coverage-v8. Tests run per-package via `vitest run`. Pattern: __tests__/ directories within each package.
verification_instructions: Run: pnpm turbo typecheck && pnpm turbo lint && pnpm turbo test && pnpm turbo build --concurrency=3
snapshot_or_generated_files: packages/database/dist/ is built from tsc. .next/ for Next.js apps. No checked-in snapshots.
setup_instructions: pnpm install (deps already installed in workspace)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22 default. pnpm 10 available. Docker available for builds.
contribution_requirements: No strict CONTRIBUTING.md. Commitlint with conventional commits. Husky hooks. CI runs typecheck, lint, test, build in that order.
key_patterns: server-core provides createApp() with Fastify + Zod validation + CORS + helmet + rate limit + auth + health + prisma plugins. AI engine uses Vercel AI SDK (ai@5) with OpenAI/Anthropic providers. Each app has backend/ folder with app.ts, routes/, services/. Packages export from src/index.ts with main:src/index.ts pattern.
directory_structure: apps/ (17 apps incl quantmail, quantchat, quantai, admin, quantube, quantneon, quantmax, quantedits, quantsync, etc), packages/ (90+ shared packages incl ai, server-core, database, auth, common, notifications, realtime, search), services/ (8 services incl ws-gateway, search-indexer, smtp-inbound, moderation-worker)
